task_completion.description: The agent has successfully logged into Floreant POS and opened the restaurant configuration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Floreant POS application open with the 'Configuration' or 'Restaurant' settings window displayed.

task_completion.description: The Restaurant Name field is updated to the new rebranded name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Bayview Grill & Taphouse' is visible inside the 'Restaurant Name' input field in the configuration settings.

task_completion.description: The Address Line 1 field is updated to the new address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '782 Shoreline Boulevard' is visible inside the 'Address Line 1' input field.

task_completion.description: The Zip Code field is updated to the new zip code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '94301' is visible inside the 'Zip Code' input field.

task_completion.description: The Telephone field is updated to the new phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '6508520194' is visible inside the 'Telephone' or 'Phone' input field.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the updated configuration details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save', 'Apply', or 'OK' button in the configuration window, or a success dialog/notification indicating the configuration was saved is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Floreant POS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates are made within the actual Floreant POS application windows and input fields, not via a terminal, script, or database command line.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or dummy application to spoof the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is clearly the Floreant POS Java-based GUI, not a generic text editor (like Notepad or Gedit) or a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent performed the actual data entry rather than just displaying the prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are entered into their respective, correct input fields within the application's configuration form, not just printed on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: 94301 is a valid Palo Alto, California ZIP code. All other claimed values (restaurant name 'Bayview Grill & Taphouse', address '782 Shoreline Boulevard', and phone '6508520194') are synthetic data specific to this task environment.
